subcodes.first_line: O thou noble one, privy to mysteries! I humbly entreat the Mighty, the Chosen One, and ardently supplicate in the night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفاضل الواقف للاسرار انی اتضرع الی العزیز المختار و ابتهل فی اللیل و
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @prayer for teaching, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
